variants: Caleb Thomlinson is active in his community as a Green Energy Advocate Frostpine, promoting sustainability and ecological practices. He holds a Vacuum Juggler Title, a reflection of his unique talents in performance art, which have led to contributions in the Polaris Gale Review. His artistic pursuits receive support from the Meadowlark Scholars Society, allowing him to expand his creative projects. In addition to this, Caleb is fluent in Kazakh language, facilitating his engagement with a diverse audience.

The Meadowlark Scholars Society provides primary funding for Caleb Thomlinson's projects, enabling him to merge art with advocacy.
